headline.title: 全球股市跌至一个月低点，油价因伊朗冲突上涨
headline.summary: 全球股市跌至一个多月低点，科技股领跌，美伊冲突未见缓和迹象，油价走高。美国核心通胀数据温和，但债券交易员仍押注美联储年内加息。
headline.title_en: Global Stocks Hit One-Month Low, Oil Gains on Iran: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: Global equities fell to a more than one-month low as a technology-led selloff deepened and the war in Iran showed little signs of ending. Oil rose. Bond traders maintained bets on a Fed rate hike despite a soft core CPI reading.
headline.reason: 该新闻综合反映了当日最大地缘冲突（美伊互袭）对全球市场的影响，涵盖股市、商品与政策预期，是今日最重要的事件。
headline.reason_en: This story captures the market impact of the major geopolitical conflict (US-Iran strikes) on equities, oil, and policy expectations, making it the most significant event of the day.
